reviews.review_description: This app provides high realism for doing calligraphy. It uses the Chinese model with simulations of ink crushing and brushes. It comes with Chinese character templates along with facilitating original creations; to save and share. I would almost say it is sacred.

First, thank you developers of this simply basic app.  Enjoyed and want more if possible.  
Able to have larger size of papers to choose from.  
More difficult size of paper and more brushes , more colors too if possible. 
Able to import templates , pictures,  photo, and paintings into the VR environment for reference if possible.   
So that I have a reference template or pictures or painting in front of you or by holding the reference template  with your other  free hand. 
Please continue to add more functions,  more options  , more idea into this app if possible.   Please add more painting functions and options .  So that it will perform both writing and painting tools.   Thank you
